(MONPP; also known as a standard mail order pharmacy within a 
split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The MOPP are currently 
referred to as standard mail order pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the 
meaning of the variable, and the data values are the same over time.
